speaker: CHORUS
text: Thus far with rough and all-unable pen

speaker: CHORUS
text: Our bending author hath pursued the story,

speaker: CHORUS
text: In little room confining mighty men,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Mangling by starts the full course of their glory.

speaker: CHORUS
text: Small time, but in that small most greatly lived

speaker: CHORUS
text: This star of England. Fortune made his sword,

speaker: CHORUS
text: By which the world’s best garden he achieved

speaker: CHORUS
text: And of it left his son imperial lord.

speaker: CHORUS
text: Henry the Sixth, in infant bands crowned King

speaker: CHORUS
text: Of France and England, did this king succeed,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Whose state so many had the managing

speaker: CHORUS
text: That they lost France and made his England bleed,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Which oft our stage hath shown. And for their sake,

speaker: CHORUS
text: In your fair minds let this acceptance take.
